test.name: Fill in checkout information and verify that the user can proceed to the next step

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\leroy\\source\\repos\\saucedemo-robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\a4b582a8-8d9f-4a95-a7d6-faa64be02b03"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\leroy\source\repos\saucedemo-robot\.venv\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:53583

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\leroy\\source\\repos\\saucedemo-robot\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\a4b582a8-8d9f-4a95-a7d6-faa64be02b03"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.saucedemo.com/
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector body at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'standard_user' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'secret_sauce' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '[data-test="login-button"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${locator} = xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Backpack"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Backpack"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${locator} = xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]'.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${locator} = xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//div[@data-test="inventory-item"][.//div[@data-test="inventory-item-name" and normalize-space(.)="Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket"]]//button[normalize-space(.)="Add to cart"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '[data-test="shopping-cart-badge"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '[data-test="checkout"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Roy' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Pietersen' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '1234AB' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '[data-test="continue"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Checkout: Overview']
${title} = Checkout: Overview
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
